description: AI skill provides an AI risk score given a skill.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

actionScopeRisk.description: Risk assessment for the action scope pillar (what the skill can do).
actionScopeRisk.title: actionScopeRisk

apps.description: The applications this skill was found under (a skill's content is shared across agents via ~/.agents/skills, so the same skill can appear under several apps).
apps.title: apps

behavioralIntegrityRisk.description: Risk assessment for the behavioral integrity pillar.
behavioralIntegrityRisk.title: behavioralIntegrityRisk

complianceRisk.description: Contextual compliance risk derived from the data the skill can reach.
complianceRisk.title: complianceRisk

dataSensitivityRisk.description: Risk assessment for the data sensitivity pillar (what data the skill can reach).
dataSensitivityRisk.title: dataSensitivityRisk

description.description: A description about the AI skill.
description.title: description

displayName.description: The human-friendly name of the skill.
displayName.title: displayName

executionContextRisk.description: Contextual risk derived from the runtime the skill executes in.
executionContextRisk.title: executionContextRisk

importHash.description: The hash of the structure used to compare with new import version.
importHash.title: importHash

importLabel.description: The user-defined import label that allows the system to group resources from the same import operation.
importLabel.title: importLabel

name.description: The name of the AI skill.
name.title: name

propagate.description: Propagates the object to all child namespaces. This is always true.
propagate.title: propagate

repo.description: The source repo of the skill.
repo.title: repo

riskScore.description: The risk score of the skill.
riskScore.title: riskScore

sourceOrigin.description: The origin of the skill (for example Internal, First-party or Community), used as a trust signal.
sourceOrigin.title: sourceOrigin

summary.description: Overall risk summary for the skill.
summary.title: summary

trustRisk.description: Risk assessment for the trust pillar (source trust of the skill).
trustRisk.title: trustRisk

updateTime.description: Last update date of the object.
updateTime.title: updateTime

vetted.description: Indicates whether the skill has been vetted.
vetted.title: vetted

title: AISkill
